name: Limeade
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Freshly Squeezed Lime Juice (About 6 limes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the freshly squeezed lime juice, cold water, and NutraSweet in a pitcher.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Refrigerate until chilled, about 30 minutes before serving.
4. Serve over ice cubes, lime slice twists, or mint sprigs, if desired.
5. For a slushy texture, freeze the mixture in an ice cube tray and serve with crushed ice.
Makes 6 servings of approximately 8 ounces each.
